Left winner: I win, C none, AND none, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none

0 I 3

0 I 3
1 OR 40

7 OR 26

Matched
0 I 3
1 OR 40
2 OR 51
3 OR 62
4 OR 73
5 OR 04
6 OR 15
7 OR 26

Applying to 01111101
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 3 = 1
1 OR 40 = OR(I 4,I 0) = OR(1,0) = 1
2 OR 51 = OR(I 5,I 1) = OR(1,1) = 1
3 OR 62 = OR(I 6,I 2) = OR(0,1) = 1
4 OR 73 = OR(I 7,I 3) = OR(1,1) = 1
5 OR 04 = OR(I 0,I 4) = OR(0,1) = 1
6 OR 15 = OR(I 1,I 5) = OR(1,1) = 1
7 OR 26 = OR(I 2,I 6) = OR(1,0) = 1

\boxed{11111111}
